description: Phase 1+2: Create the MVDR beamformer header-only C++ module and integrate stereo capture + beamforming into the AudioEngine. This includes: creating mvdr_beamformer.h with full MVDR algorithm (FFT, STFT, overlap-add, Rnn estimation, weight computation, steering vector), modifying audio_engine.h to add beamformingEnabled config + MvdrBeamformer member + deinterleave buffers, and modifying audio_engine.cpp to support conditional stereo capture and invoke the beamformer in onBothStreamsReady before the DNN.
steps: 1. Create android/app/src/main/cpp/mvdr_beamformer.h as a complete header-only implementation following the pseudocode in the spec (section 6). Include: MvdrBeamformer class with init(), setEnabled(), isEnabled(), process() methods. Internals: realFFT/realIFFT (Cooley-Tukey radix-2), processFrame (STFT+MVDR+ISTFT), updateRnn (exponential smoothing), computeMvdrWeights (2x2 matrix inversion), computeSteeringVector. Constants: kFftSize=256, kHopSize=128, kNumBins=129, kRnnAlpha=0.98, kReg=1e-6, kMicSpacing=0.14, kSoundSpeed=343. Use std::complex<float>, std::atomic<bool> for enabled_, overlap-add output buffer.

2. Modify android/app/src/main/cpp/audio_engine.h: Add '#include "mvdr_beamformer.h"' after the existing includes. Add 'bool beamformingEnabled = false;' field to AudioEngineConfig struct. In the private section of AudioEngine class, add: 'static constexpr int kMaxBeamBlockSize = 1024;', 'float beamCh0_[kMaxBeamBlockSize] = {};', 'float beamCh1_[kMaxBeamBlockSize] = {};', 'MvdrBeamformer mvdrBeamformer_;'. Add public methods: 'void setBeamformingEnabled(bool enabled);' and 'bool isBeamformingActive() const;'.

3. Modify android/app/src/main/cpp/audio_engine.cpp - openInputStream(): After the existing 'builder.setChannelCount(1);' line, replace it with conditional logic: if config_.beamformingEnabled, set ChannelCount(2), else set ChannelCount(1). Add fallback: if openStream fails with 2 channels, retry with 1 channel and log warning, setting a flag that stereo is unavailable.

4. Modify android/app/src/main/cpp/audio_engine.cpp - start(): After the line 'sceneAnalyzer_.init(effectiveSampleRate, config_.splOffset);', add 'mvdrBeamformer_.init(effectiveSampleRate);' and 'if (config_.beamformingEnabled) { mvdrBeamformer_.setEnabled(true); }'.

5. Modify android/app/src/main/cpp/audio_engine.cpp - onBothStreamsReady(): Replace the block that copies input to output ('std::memcpy(outPtr, inPtr, numFrames * sizeof(float));') with the deinterleave + beamforming logic from the spec section 5.5. When beamforming is enabled AND mvdrBeamformer_ is enabled, deinterleave stereo input into beamCh0_/beamCh1_, get VAD state from sceneAnalyzer_.getVad().isVoiceActive(), call mvdrBeamformer_.process(beamCh0_, beamCh1_, outPtr, numFrames, vadActive). When beamforming config is on but beamformer is disabled (bypass), extract only ch0 from interleaved. When beamforming is off (legacy mono), use memcpy as before.

6. Implement setBeamformingEnabled() and isBeamformingActive() in audio_engine.cpp: setBeamformingEnabled delegates to mvdrBeamformer_.setEnabled(enabled). isBeamformingActive returns mvdrBeamformer_.isEnabled().
7. Verify: run clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only on mvdr_beamformer.h standalone to confirm it compiles without errors.
acceptance_criteria: mvdr_beamformer.h exists and contains the complete MVDR beamformer implementation as a header-only class
audio_engine.h includes mvdr_beamformer.h and declares the beamformer member, buffers, and config field
audio_engine.cpp conditionally opens stereo input when beamformingEnabled=true
audio_engine.cpp onBothStreamsReady deinterleaves stereo and invokes the beamformer before DNN
Fallback to mono capture if stereo fails
findings: All 7 steps completed successfully. mvdr_beamformer.h passes clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only standalone. Added stereoInputAvailable_ flag for robust fallback detection. Fixed SceneAnalyzer, ToneAnalyzer, and DiagnosticRecorder to use mono reference channel (beamCh0_) when in stereo mode. Diagnostic log now uses outPtr (post-beamforming mono) for peak measurement consistency.
